arts.ttl: Transfer window preview: Needs for Liverpool, Man United, more
arts.sum: But, sources have told ESPN that he is Madrid's top defensive target following an injury to right-back Dani Carvajal, the Spanish club are likely to wait until next summer to try and tempt him to the Bernabéu on a free transfer. Speaking on Dec. 4, Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou said: "There's no doubt we need some bolstering in that front third over the course of the next couple of transfer windows." Fresh injury setbacks for Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven could make a centre-back signing more of an immediate priority and central midfield is another position which could use an upgrade, but Postecoglou's thinking in where Spurs need to improve in the longer term could not be clearer.

arts.ttl: How to watch Southampton vs Liverpool - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Liverpool will continue their Carabao Cup trophy defence with a quarter-final game against Premier League side Southampton at St. Mary's Stadium.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s forgotten man set for Carabao Cup return – just in time for festive mayhem
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s only summer signing has not featured for the Reds since September but is likely to be involved in the quarter-final clash against Southampton

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot makes honest admission on trying to influence referees
arts.sum: Arne Slot will have to serve a one-match touchline ban during Liverpool's Carabao Cup quarter-final against Southampton on Wednesday - and the Dutchman has opened up on his behaviour

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Tottenham team from their 5-1 victory over Southampton in December 2004?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: 'I don't think they got it right': Jason Dodd shares what Southampton have really done wrong this season
arts.sum: Southampton are currently in dire straits after going nine points adrift of safety at the bottom of the Premier League table. The Saints did well...

arts.ttl: Southampton vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot to make changes after Andy Robertson red card, Diogo Jota injury
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot is set to make a number of changes to the Reds' starting lineup against Southampton on Wednesday night in the quarter-final of the EFL Cup.

arts.ttl: Who is Sipke Hulshoff? Arne Slot's trusted Liverpool assistant to step into limelight
arts.sum: Arne Slot will serve a one-match touchline ban for Liverpool's Carabao Cup quarter-final tie at Southampton on Wednesday night, meaning his assistant manager will step up

arts.ttl: Who is Arne Slot's Liverpool assistant manager in charge vs Southampton
arts.sum: Sipke Hulshoff and former Everton defender John Heitinga will be in the dugout for Liverpool due to Arne Slot's suspension

arts.ttl: Slot the difference - Liverpool's tactical tweaks under new boss
arts.sum: BBC Sport takes a closer look at some of Liverpool's more subtle tactical tweaks since Arne Slot took over from Jurgen Klopp.
